analysis.btc_price_note: BTC at $78,324 on May 2 (up ~1.89% in 24h). Broken out of multi-month descending channel — 31% rally off yearly lows. Key resistance: $80K not yet broken. ATH $126,198 (Oct 2025). Bitcoin dominance 58.5%. Daily volume $37.5B.

analysis.macro_backdrop: FOMC held 3.5-3.75% on Apr 29. CPI at 3.3% above 2% target. Iran peace proposal pushing crude futures down ~5% (positive macro relief). Key today: Initial Jobless Claims 12:30 UTC + Fed speeches 15:00 UTC. Next major events: ISM Services May 5, NFP May 8, CPI/PPI May 12-13. Fed leadership transition (Powell exits May 15, Warsh incoming) adds uncertainty.
analysis.regime_rationale: Bullish (0.62): BTC breaking out of multi-month descending channel with ETF inflows surging ($630M May 1). Institutional demand robust. Iran peace talks easing oil price pressure — removes key macro headwind from prior analysis. However, $80K resistance not yet broken, CPI elevated, futures funding ambiguous, and geopolitical stalemate unresolved. Confidence capped at 0.62 — bot macro filter ACTIVE.
